name: NudgeBanner mark-all-read failure swallowed; banner re-nags with no recovery
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-05] fire-and-forget mutate with no onError; on failure modal closes but nudges stay unread and banner reappears. Fix: add onError toast/keep-open-with-retry.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: NudgeBanner.closeModal closes the modal and calls markAllRead.mutate() fire-and-forget, with no onError path; a failed mutation leaves nudges unread so the banner reappears without explanation or recovery. Variant: single variant, dismiss/mark-all-read mutation failure. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/components/nudge/NudgeBanner.test.tsx mocks a failed mark-all-read mutation and fails without the fix; it passes only when the UI keeps/reopens a recoverable state or surfaces an actionable error/retry instead of silently closing.
